title: Fix heartbeat cycles balance API usage

requirements.text: Update `backend/main.mo` `getHeartbeatData` so the `cycles` value no longer uses any unavailable cycles balance API: attempt to use `ExperimentalCycles.balance()` for the canister cycle balance; if `ExperimentalCycles.balance()` is not available in this Motoko version, set `cycles` to `0` and add the exact comment `// TODO: Replace with actual cycle balance API when available.`. Do not change any other logic, types, fields, access control, or behavior in `getHeartbeatData` beyond this `cycles` retrieval adjustment.

quotes:
Runtime.cyclesBalance is not available in this Motoko version.
Try ExperimentalCycles.balance() instead. If that is also not
available, set cycles to 0 and add the comment:
// TODO: Replace with actual cycle balance API when available.
Do not change anything else.

acceptanceCriteria: `backend/main.mo` compiles in the target environment without referencing `Runtime.cyclesBalance`.
`getHeartbeatData` continues to return the same `HeartbeatData` shape and keeps all existing fields/logic unchanged except for how `cycles` is obtained.

If `ExperimentalCycles.balance()` can be used in this Motoko version, `cycles` is set from it; otherwise `cycles` is set to `0` and the function includes the exact comment `// TODO: Replace with actual cycle balance API when available.` near the fallback.
No other public methods, types, or access control checks in `backend/main.mo` are modified as part of this change.

constraints: Backend must remain a single Motoko actor in `backend/main.mo`.
Do not change anything in `getHeartbeatData` other than the `cycles` retrieval logic as specified.
Use English for any user-facing text (not applicable to this change).
nonGoals: Do not implement the broader 'real data' heartbeat lookup (botProfiles/userProfiles/licenses) in this change.
Do not make any frontend/UI changes.
Do not modify or wire Stripe-related APIs as part of this change.
